EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TIMIN, VLADIMIR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAINT FRANCIS MEMORIAL HOSPITAL CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST THE EVIDNCE PRESENTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH A CLAIM FOR DAMAGES OR ASSUALT; AND ANY CLAIM OF MEDICAL MALPRACTICE WAS NOT SUPPORTED BY EXPERT OPINION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
